(a) The department shall send in a timely manner a notice to each person whose driver’s license is suspended under Section 601.231 (Suspension of Driver’s License) .

(b) The notice must state that the person’s driver’s license is suspended and that the person may apply for reinstatement of the license or issuance of a new license as provided by Sections 601.162 (Duration of Suspension) and 601.376 (Reinstatement Fee) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.232 — Notice of Suspension

(a) The department shall send in a timely manner a notice to each person whose driver’s license is suspended under Section 601.231 (Suspension of Driver’s License) .

(b) The notice must state that the person’s driver’s license is suspended and that the person may apply for reinstatement of the license or issuance of a new license as provided by Sections 601.162 (Duration of Suspension) and 601.376 (Reinstatement Fee) .

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 598 (H.B.3224), Sec. 4, eff. September 1, 2023.*
